title: Utah under historic ‘red flag’ weather warning amid dangerous wildfires
summary_full: Governor also announced state of emergency and banned personal fireworks in state until after Fourth of JulySalt Lake City’s National Weather Service declared a “particularly dangerous situation red flag warning”, the first in the service’s history, according to a social media post.“THIS IS EXTREMELY RARE … Wind gusts of 40-50+ mph, combined with hot temperatures and extremely dry air, could cause explosive wildfire growth. Any new fire that starts could spread rapidly and become difficult to control,” said Chase Thomason, a meteorologist for KUTV, Utah’s CBS affiliate. Continue reading...
